articles.title: NVIDIA Reports Record Data Center Revenue
articles.summary: NVIDIA posted another quarter of record data center segment revenue, driven by continued strong demand for AI accelerators.

articles.title: NVIDIA Raises Forward Guidance on AI Chip Demand
articles.summary: NVIDIA guided next quarter revenue well above consensus, citing sustained demand for its latest AI training and inference chips.

articles.title: NVIDIA Announces Stock Split
articles.summary: NVIDIA's board approved a stock split, aiming to make shares more accessible to a broader base of individual investors.

articles.title: Analyst Raises NVIDIA Price Target on AI Backlog
articles.summary: An analyst raised their NVIDIA price target, citing a growing order backlog for next-generation AI accelerator chips.

articles.title: NVIDIA Announces Partnership With Major Cloud Providers
articles.summary: NVIDIA expanded partnerships with major cloud providers to deploy its latest chips at scale.

articles.title: NVIDIA Shares Volatile on Chip Export Policy Headlines
articles.summary: NVIDIA shares moved on renewed headlines about semiconductor export policy affecting the broader chip sector.
